name: On User Created — Seed Data

data.title: Hello, Python!
data.description: A simple Python function with a parameter — run it with the Python runner.
data.code:
def greet(name: str = "World") -> str:
    """Return a personalised greeting."""
    return f"Hello, {name}!"

print(greet())

data.title: Fibonacci
data.description: Classic recursive Fibonacci — supports up to n=30 before it gets slow.
data.code:
def fibonacci(n: int = 10) -> list[int]:
    """Return the first n Fibonacci numbers."""
    seq = [0, 1]
    for _ in range(n - 2):
        seq.append(seq[-1] + seq[-2])
    return seq[:n]

print(fibonacci())
